title: Manhunt under way after bomb injures Ukrainian oligarch and others in Monaco
summary_full: The blast was caused by an explosive device which appeared to contain bolts and pellets, the head of Monaco's government said.
summary_public: The blast was caused by an explosive device which appeared to contain bolts and pellets, the head of Monaco's government said.
